title: <div><tt>This flow shows the logical progression: </tt><b><tt>Evaluate → Reinfor
content:
This flow shows the logical progression: Evaluate → Reinforce → Analyze Risks → Grow.
-----
-----

AI Prompt Chain Checklist with Example Outputs


AI Prompt Chain Checklist

: Complete and Polished Version


This checklist provides a structured approach for evaluating, reinforcing, and improving any content, following best practices and iterative refinement.

---
---

Evaluation Phase


Critique
    • Prompt: "Evaluate this content thoroughly. Identify its key strengths and weaknesses. Highlight which parts are effective and which need improvement, providing specific reasons."
    • Example Output:
      • Strengths: Clear main argument, well-structured introduction
      • Weaknesses: Conclusion is weak, supporting evidence is minimal in section 3
context: From document: From Evaluation to Growth — chunk 7 (chunk 7/12)
